data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Split generic parts of ament_cmake_ros into _core package (#20)

In an effort to increase the utility of the test isolation in
ament_cmake_ros, I'd like to take additional dependencies which are
currently downstream of ament_cmake_ros. These packages only depend on
ament_cmake_ros for some basic CMake configuration, so this change
extracts that configuration into a new *_core package (aligning with
ament_cmake_core).

There should be no change in behavior for packages which currently
depend on ament_cmake_ros. Dependees which don't require the testing
macros from ament_cmake_ros will now have the option to switch to the
new ament_cmake_ros_core package.

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>

data.author: roehling
data.message:
Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager (#12)

* Refactor domain_coordinator API to use a context manager

The domain_coordinator refactored to expose a single context manager
which returns a unique ROS_DOMAIN_ID that is valid until the context
goes out of scope.

The function has been deliberately renamed to force fatal errors if
the call site was not updated to use a "with" context.

Fixes #9

Signed-off-by: Timo Röhling <timo.roehling@fkie.fraunhofer.de>

data.author: pbaughman
data.message:
Add ament_add_pytest_isolated and ament_add_gtest_isolated (#3)

* ament_cmake_ros add cmake test functions with isolation

  - Add a domain_coordinator package containing the functionality from launch_testing and
    a run_test_isolated.py script that can be used by the isolated cmake test functions instead
    of the default run_test.py
  - Add ament_cmake_gtest_isolated to run gtests with ROS_DOMAIN_ID isolation
  - Add ament_cmake_pytest_isolated to run pytests with ROS_DOMAIN_ID isolation

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>

* ament_cmake_ros Add doc strings for cmake test functions

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>

* ament_cmake_test_isolated shuffle run_test_isolated into its own package

  - Make domain_coordinator an ament_python package
  - remove run_test_isolated.py from domain_coordinator
  - Add a new cmake package that provides run_test_isolated.py

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>

* Address PR comments

  - Fix copyright date from 2017->2019
  - Simplify dependencies of isolated test packages
  - Put more information in domain_coordinator setup.py

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>

* Add missing fields in setup.py

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>

* Rename ament_cmake_*_isolated to ament_cmake_ros_isolated_*

  - Give a better name so this doesn't seem like the same thing as build isolated vs build merge install
  - Add the explanation of how ROS_DOMAIN_ID is selected in the cmake function documentation

Signed-off-by: Pete Baughman <pete.baughman@apex.ai>
